Name: AWS - Find Blue-Green Target Group
Description: Find the online and offline target groups for a blue-green deployment

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.Region
Parameters.Label: Region
Parameters.HelpText: The AWS region. See https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/global-infrastructure/regions_az/ for more information.

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.BlueTargetGroup
Parameters.Label: Blue Target Group ARN
Parameters.HelpText: The ARN of the blue target group. See https://docs.aws.amazon.com/elasticloadbalancing/latest/application/load-balancer-target-groups.html for more details.

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.GreenTargetGroup
Parameters.Label: Green Target Group ARN
Parameters.HelpText: The ARN of the green target group. See https://docs.aws.amazon.com/elasticloadbalancing/latest/application/load-balancer-target-groups.html for more details.

Parameters.Name: AWSBlueGreen.AWS.RuleArn
Parameters.Label: Rule ARN
Parameters.HelpText: The ARN of the listener rule to update. See https://docs.aws.amazon.com/elasticloadbalancing/latest/application/listener-update-rules.html for more information.
